llm_answer.note: Reasoning model — temperature parameter not applicable

embedding.note: Cognee Cloud manages embedding internally; expected to be text-embedding-3-small based on source code

retrieval.method: Cognee CHUNKS search (vector retrieval on DocumentChunk_text collection)
retrieval.note: CHUNKS mode performs pure vector search, returning raw text chunks without LLM completion

database.note: Managed by Cognee Cloud SaaS (graph + vector internals not configurable)

ingestion.strategy: per-session serial upload, then cognify once per conversation

dataset.name: LoCoMo-10
dataset.excluded: Category 5 (Adversarial) — 446 questions excluded per standard methodology
